_meta.description: Grand Central Payments Connector error mapping configuration. Maps raw codes from rail, connector, and core to a canonical response envelope. No retry flags, SLA targets, or ops actions - those are the bank's operational policy, not the connector's contract.

sections.rail: Standard scheme codes. Finite, regulated, identical for every bank. Platform-owned.
sections.core: Bank core codes. Bank-owned. Meridian T24 mappings.
sections.fallback: Applied when rawCode has no matching entry. Always returns a structured response.

fields.origin: Where the failure came from. Derived from the config entry, not from runtime state.
fields.code: Canonical code. Stable across all banks on the platform.

rail._comment: SEPA scheme reason codes (pacs.002) and SWIFT rejection codes. Platform-standard.

AC01.reason: Incorrect account number format or check digit.

AC09.reason: Account currency is not valid for this transaction.

AC11.reason: Transaction account is not valid for this transaction.

AC12.reason: Creditor account type is missing or invalid.

AC13.reason: Debtor account type is missing or invalid.

AC14.reason: Agent account is missing or invalid.

AG01.reason: Transaction is forbidden for this type of account.

AG04.reason: Agent in message is not valid.

AM03.reason: Specified message amount currency is not allowed.

AM04.reason: Insufficient funds in the account to cover the transaction.

AM06.reason: Amount is below the minimum allowed.

AM09.reason: Amount received is different from expected.

AM10.reason: Sum of instructed amounts does not match control sum.

AM12.reason: Amount is invalid for the transaction.

AM14.reason: Amount exceeds agreed limit for this account.

BE01.reason: Identification of end customer not consistent with account number.

BE04.reason: Creditor address is missing or incomplete.

BE07.reason: Debtor address is missing or incomplete.

BE09.reason: Currency is not valid for the account.

CH03.reason: Requested execution date is too far in the future.

CNOR.reason: Creditor BIC is not registered in the EBA directory.

DNOR.reason: Debtor BIC is not registered in the EBA directory.

DS02.reason: Order has been cancelled by authorised customer.

DS24.reason: Waiting time for authorisation has expired.

DT01.reason: Invalid date, for example, settlement date in the past.

DT03.reason: Requested processing date falls on a non-processing day.

DT04.reason: Future date is not supported for this transaction type.

DT06.reason: Execution date has been changed to next available date.

ED05.reason: Settlement of the transaction has failed.

FF03.reason: Payment type information is incorrect or missing.

FOCR.reason: Payment returned following a cancellation request.

FR01.reason: Fraud suspected - transaction blocked at rail.

MD01.reason: No mandate found for the transaction.

MD02.reason: Mandatory information for mandate is missing.

NARR.reason: Reason is given in narrative form in the additional information.

RC08.reason: Clearing system member ID is invalid.

RJCT.reason: Payment rejected by SWIFT or correspondent bank. See rawCode for scheme detail.

RR01.reason: Regulatory reason - debtor account is missing.

RR02.reason: Regulatory reason - debtor name or address is missing.

RR03.reason: Regulatory reason - creditor name or address is missing.

SL01.reason: Transaction rejected due to creditor-specific service level.

SL02.reason: Transaction rejected due to debtor-specific service level.

SL11.reason: Creditor is not on the payer's whitelist.

SL12.reason: Creditor is on the payer's blacklist.

TM01.reason: Cut-off time for settlement has been exceeded.

connector._comment: Connector-generated codes. Platform-standard across all bank implementations.

TIMEOUT.reason: No response received from the payment rail within the allowed window.

VALIDATION_ERROR.reason: Payment instruction failed connector-level validation before submission.

UNSUPPORTED_RAIL.reason: Payment method specified is not supported by this connector version.

SERIALISATION_ERROR.reason: Failed to serialise the payment instruction for the target rail.

DESERIALISATION_ERROR.reason: Failed to deserialise the response received from the rail.

CONNECTION_ERROR.reason: Could not establish a connection to the payment rail endpoint.

SSL_ERROR.reason: SSL handshake with the payment rail endpoint failed.

SCHEMA_VALIDATION_FAILED.reason: The rail returned a response that does not match the expected schema.

IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT.reason: A payment with this paymentId has already been submitted.

CONFIG_MISSING.reason: Required connector configuration is missing or invalid.

RAIL_AUTH_FAILED.reason: Authentication with the payment rail failed.

INTERNAL_ERROR.reason: An unexpected internal error occurred in the connector.

core._comment: Meridian Bank T24 core error codes. Bank-owned. Any bank adding its own core codes extends this section.

AC.CLOSED.reason: Debtor account is closed in the core banking system.

AC.BLOCKED.reason: Debtor account is blocked in the core banking system.

AC.FROZEN.reason: Debtor account is frozen. May be under regulatory hold.

AC.NOT.FOUND.reason: Debtor account was not found in the core banking system.

BAL.INSUFFICIENT.reason: Insufficient cleared funds in the debtor account.

BAL.LIMIT.EXCEEDED.reason: Transaction would exceed the account daily transfer limit.

BAL.UNCLEARED.reason: Available balance includes uncleared funds not eligible for transfer.

CUST.DECEASED.reason: Account holder is recorded as deceased in the core system.

CUST.SANCTIONED.reason: Account holder has been flagged under sanctions screening.

OFAC.HOLD.reason: Transaction held pending OFAC/sanctions compliance review.

CRED.AC.NOT.FOUND.reason: Creditor account was not found in the core banking system.

CRED.AC.CLOSED.reason: Creditor account is closed in the core banking system.

CURR.NOT.SUPPORTED.reason: Currency of the transaction is not supported for this account.

CURR.MISMATCH.reason: Transaction currency does not match the account currency and conversion is not permitted.

FX.RATE.UNAVAILABLE.reason: FX rate for the required currency pair is not currently available.

PMT.DUPLICATE.reason: A duplicate payment has been detected by the core system.

PMT.LIMIT.SINGLE.reason: Transaction amount exceeds the single transaction limit.

PMT.LIMIT.VELOCITY.reason: Transaction would exceed the account velocity limit.

AUTH.REQUIRED.reason: Transaction requires additional authorisation from the account holder.

CORE.UNAVAILABLE.reason: Core banking system is temporarily unavailable.

CORE.TIMEOUT.reason: Core banking system did not respond within the required window.

EB-CHK-VAL-001.reason: Core banking validation error. See rawCode for T24 detail.

EB-CHK-VAL-002.reason: Core banking validation error. See rawCode for T24 detail.

EB-CHK-VAL-003.reason: Core banking validation error. See rawCode for T24 detail.

EB-PMT-REJ-001.reason: Payment rejected by core banking system. See rawCode for T24 detail.

EB-PMT-REJ-002.reason: Payment rejected by core banking system. See rawCode for T24 detail.

EB-ACC-FRZ-001.reason: Account is frozen in the T24 core.

EB-LIM-001.reason: Transaction breaches a limit configured in the T24 core.

EB-LIM-002.reason: Transaction breaches a limit configured in the T24 core.

fallback._comment: Applied when the rawCode has no matching entry in rail, connector, or core sections. Always returns a structured response. rawCode is always preserved.
fallback.reason: Failure code could not be mapped. Raw code is preserved in rawCode field.
